mapper.select:
select jsh_depot_item.header_id, STRING_AGG(concat(jsh_material."name",' ',COALESCE(jsh_material.standard,''),' ', COALESCE(jsh_material.model,''),' ',COALESCE(jsh_material.color,'')), ',') as materialsList from jsh_depot_item left join jsh_material on jsh_depot_item.material_id = jsh_material.Id and COALESCE(jsh_material.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1
and jsh_depot_item.header_id in
#{item}
and COALESCE(jsh_depot_item.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by jsh_depot_item.header_id

select header_id, sum(oper_number) materialCount from jsh_depot_item where 1=1
and header_id in
#{item}
and COALESCE(delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by header_id

select count(1) from (select s.id, s.supplier, s.contacts, s.telephone, s.phone_num, s.email, -- 起始期初金额 (case when s."type"='供应商' then COALESCE(s.begin_need_pay,0) else COALESCE(s.begin_need_get,0) end) begin_need, -- 上期欠款金额 (select COALESCE(sum(dh.discount_last_money),0)+COALESCE(sum(dh.other_money),0)-COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0)-abs(COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0)) from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=s.id and dh."type"=#{type} and dh.sub_type=#{subType} and dh.oper_time <= #{beginTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') preDebtMoney, -- 上期退货的欠款金额 (select COALESCE(sum(dh.discount_last_money),0)+COALESCE(sum(dh.other_money),0)-COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0)-abs(COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0)) from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=s.id and dh."type"=#{typeBack} and dh.sub_type=#{subTypeBack} and dh.oper_time <= #{beginTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') preReturnDebtMoney, -- 上期收款 (select COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_item ai left join jsh_account_head ah on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.organ_id=s.id and ah."type"='收款' and ah.bill_time <= #{beginTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1') preBackInMoney, -- 上期付款 (select 0-COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_item ai left join jsh_account_head ah on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.organ_id=s.id and ah."type"='付款' and ah.bill_time <= #{beginTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1') preBackOutMoney, -- 本期欠款 (select COALESCE(sum(dh.discount_last_money),0)+COALESCE(sum(dh.other_money),0)-COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0)-abs(COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0)) from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=s.id and dh."type"=#{type} and dh.sub_type=#{subType} and dh.oper_time>#{beginTime}::timestamp and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') debtMoney, -- 本期退货的欠款金额 (select COALESCE(sum(dh.discount_last_money),0)+COALESCE(sum(dh.other_money),0)-COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0)-abs(COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0)) from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=s.id and dh."type"=#{typeBack} and dh.sub_type=#{subTypeBack} and dh.oper_time>#{beginTime}::timestamp and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') returnDebtMoney, -- 本期收款 (select COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_item ai left join jsh_account_head ah on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.organ_id=s.id and ah."type"='收款' and ah.bill_time>#{beginTime}::timestamp and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1') backInMoney, -- 本期付款 (select 0-COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_item ai left join jsh_account_head ah on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.organ_id=s.id and ah."type"='付款' and ah.bill_time>#{beginTime}::timestamp and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1') backOutMoney from jsh_supplier s where s.enabled=true and s."type"=#{supplierType}
and s.id = #{organId}::bigint
and s.id in (
#{organId}::bigint
)
and COALESCE(s.delete_flag,'0') !='1') tb
where begin_need+preDebtMoney-preReturnDebtMoney-preBackInMoney-preBackOutMoney+debtMoney-returnDebtMoney-backInMoney-backOutMoney!=0
where begin_need+preDebtMoney-preReturnDebtMoney-preBackInMoney-preBackOutMoney+debtMoney-returnDebtMoney-backInMoney-backOutMoney=0

select sum(begin_need) begin_need, sum(preDebtMoney) preDebtMoney, sum(preReturnDebtMoney) preReturnDebtMoney, sum(preBackInMoney+preBackOutMoney) preBackMoney, sum(debtMoney) debtMoney, sum(returnDebtMoney) returnDebtMoney, sum(backInMoney+backOutMoney) backMoney from (select s.id, (case when s."type"='供应商' then COALESCE(s.begin_need_pay,0) else COALESCE(s.begin_need_get,0) end) begin_need, (select COALESCE(sum(dh.discount_last_money),0)+COALESCE(sum(dh.other_money),0)-COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0)-abs(COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0)) from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=s.id and dh."type"=#{type} and dh.sub_type=#{subType} and dh.oper_time <= #{beginTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') preDebtMoney, (select COALESCE(sum(dh.discount_last_money),0)+COALESCE(sum(dh.other_money),0)-COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0)-abs(COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0)) from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=s.id and dh."type"=#{typeBack} and dh.sub_type=#{subTypeBack} and dh.oper_time <= #{beginTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') preReturnDebtMoney, (select COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_item ai left join jsh_account_head ah on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.organ_id=s.id and ah."type"='收款' and ah.bill_time <= #{beginTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1') preBackInMoney, (select 0-COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_item ai left join jsh_account_head ah on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.organ_id=s.id and ah."type"='付款' and ah.bill_time <= #{beginTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1') preBackOutMoney, (select COALESCE(sum(dh.discount_last_money),0)+COALESCE(sum(dh.other_money),0)-COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0)-abs(COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0)) from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=s.id and dh."type"=#{type} and dh.sub_type=#{subType} and dh.oper_time>#{beginTime}::timestamp and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') debtMoney, (select COALESCE(sum(dh.discount_last_money),0)+COALESCE(sum(dh.other_money),0)-COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0)-abs(COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0)) from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=s.id and dh."type"=#{typeBack} and dh.sub_type=#{subTypeBack} and dh.oper_time>#{beginTime}::timestamp and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') returnDebtMoney, (select COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_item ai left join jsh_account_head ah on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.organ_id=s.id and ah."type"='收款' and ah.bill_time>#{beginTime}::timestamp and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1') backInMoney, (select 0-COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_item ai left join jsh_account_head ah on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.organ_id=s.id and ah."type"='付款' and ah.bill_time>#{beginTime}::timestamp and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1') backOutMoney from jsh_supplier s where s.enabled=true and s."type"=#{supplierType}
and s.id = #{organId}::bigint
and s.id in (
#{organId}::bigint
)
and COALESCE(s.delete_flag,'0') !='1') tb
where begin_need+preDebtMoney-preReturnDebtMoney-preBackInMoney-preBackOutMoney+debtMoney-returnDebtMoney-backInMoney-backOutMoney!=0
where begin_need+preDebtMoney-preReturnDebtMoney-preBackInMoney-preBackOutMoney+debtMoney-returnDebtMoney-backInMoney-backOutMoney=0

select distinct dh.id, dh.discount_last_money, dh.total_price, dh."type", dh.sub_type, dh.oper_time from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id = di.header_id and COALESCE(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where di.id is not null and (dh."type"='入库' or dh."type"='出库')
and dh.oper_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and (dh.status = '1' or dh.status = '2' or dh.status = '3')
and dh.creator in (
#{creator}::bigint
)
and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1'

select count(1) from ( select distinct dh.*, s.supplier OrganName, u.username userName from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_supplier s on dh.organ_id=s.id and COALESCE(s.delete_Flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_user u on dh.creator=u.id and COALESCE(u.delete_flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id = di.header_id and COALESCE(di.delete_flag,'0') !='1' left join jsh_material m on di.material_id = m.id and COALESCE(m.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1 and (dh."type"='入库' or dh."type"='出库') and (dh.sub_type='采购' or dh.sub_type='销售' or dh.sub_type='采购退货' or dh.sub_type='销售退货')
and dh.organ_id = #{organId}::bigint
and dh.status =#{status}
and dh.number like #{bindNumber}
and dh.oper_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and (m."name" like #{bindKey} or m.standard like #{bindKey} or m.model like #{bindKey})
and di.depot_id in (
#{depotId}::bigint
)
and dh.creator in (
#{creator}::bigint
)
and (COALESCE(abs(dh.change_amount),0)+(select COALESCE(sum(abs(ai.each_amount)),0) from jsh_account_item ai where ai.bill_id=dh.id and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1')) < (COALESCE(dh.discount_last_money,0) + COALESCE(dh.other_money,0) - COALESCE(dh.deposit,0)) and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' ) tb

select dh.link_number number, COALESCE(sum(dh.deposit),0) finishDeposit from jsh_depot_head dh where 1=1
and dh.link_number in
#{item}
and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by dh.link_number
select count(s.id) from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_serial_number s on dh.number=s.in_bill_no where dh.number = #{number} and (s.out_bill_no is not null or s.out_bill_no!='')

select COALESCE(sum(dh.total_price),0) allPrice from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.organ_id=#{organId}::bigint and dh.pay_type = '预付款' and ((dh."type" = '出库' and dh.sub_type = '零售') or (dh."type" = '入库' and dh.sub_type = '零售退货')) and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1'
